observations_phase_7: .planning/phases/06-address-phase-5-6-uat-findings/PHASE-7-CANDIDATES.md (Finding A: silent apply-then-revert; Finding B: pv-* not carried forward)

completed_tasks.name: Manual UAT of /lz-advisor.review on plugin 0.8.9 against commits 09a09d7^..0cb8ae7
observations_phase_7: Strengthens Finding A (3 of 4 consultations recommend fn() spy; executor revert was un-grounded)
Strengthens Finding B (review-skill prompt had 0 pv-* blocks; reviewer guessed Storybook 8.x when 10.3.5 is installed)

remaining_tasks.name: Manual UAT of /lz-advisor.security-review on plugin 0.8.9 against commits 09a09d7^..0cb8ae7

human_actions_pending.action: Launch interactive Claude in ngx-smart-components testbed and run /lz-advisor.security-review on the execute-skill output
human_actions_pending.context: Verifies security-review-skill scan + security-reviewer (yellow, xhigh effort) consultation against the same commit range 09a09d7^..0cb8ae7. The security-reviewer agent has its own 250w + 100-150w two-slot budget and produces ### Findings + ### Threat Patterns slots with OWASP-aligned severity. Expected behaviors: scope from git (D-11 J-narrative-isolation), surface security-relevant findings (input validation, output encoding, dependency pinning, gitignore leakage), preserve literal headers in output.

decisions.decision: Path C2 (descriptive-trigger refinement) chosen over C1 (advisor refusal) and C3 (PreToolUse hook)
decisions.rationale: Anthropic 2026 prompt-engineering doc and prior memory both warn against imperative escalation; descriptive triggers + worked examples + reordering + tightened triggers is the recommended pattern.

decisions.decision: Strip personal CLAUDE.md fetch chain references (markdown.new, url-to-markdown, playwright-cli) from SKILL body
decisions.rationale: Marketplace plugin neutrality. User-level fetch substitutes operate at a different precedence layer; plugin shouldn't enumerate them.

decisions.decision: Treat Stage 1 KCB synthetic-fixture FAIL as historical context, not operative gate verdict
decisions.rationale: Manual UAT on plugin 0.8.9 against realistic Compodoc + Storybook setup prompt produced 7 web tool calls and the highest-quality plan of any version tested. KCB synthetic prompt didn't exercise the rich orient + pre_verified pattern.

decisions.decision: Update 06-VERIFICATION.md to PASS-with-caveat (gate_verdict, status, web_usage_count) and append amendment section
decisions.rationale: Reflects empirical state on plugin 0.8.9 while preserving Stage 1 history for traceability.

decisions.decision: Broaden Phase 7 Finding B from intra-skill carry-forward to cross-skill carry-forward
decisions.rationale: Review-skill UAT showed pv-* blocks were not packaged at all in the review consultation, even though plan skill produced 4 anchored claims. The fix surface is the workflow boundary, not just a single skill's Verification template.

next_action: Launch /lz-advisor.security-review UAT in ngx-smart-components testbed against the execute-skill output. Same commit range as the review-skill UAT. Invoke as: '/lz-advisor.security-review 09a09d7^..0cb8ae7'.
context_notes: Phase 6 has now closed plan-skill, execute-skill, and review-skill UATs on plugin 0.8.9. The review-skill UAT verdict was PASS (clean three-phase workflow, schema-correct reviewer output, word budget within ~400w target). Two observations strengthened existing Phase 7 candidates rather than introducing new ones: (1) the reviewer recommended the same fn() spy approach the execute-skill executor silently reverted, making Finding A more concrete; (2) the review-skill prompt contained zero pv-* blocks despite the plan skill producing 4, broadening Finding B to a cross-skill carry-forward gap. Next: security-review-skill UAT to close the four-skill matrix.

uat_iteration_history.change: Promoted WebSearch-first to SKILL body + Bash-substitute prohibition
Narrowed prohibition to WebSearch-only (allow fetch substitutes)
Reordered ranking to web-first + tightened step 2 trigger + worked example + stripped personal-tool refs
uat_iteration_history.result: 2 WebSearch + 5 WebFetch + 4 pre_verified blocks; highest-quality plan
